arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) uniquely identifying the KMS public key.

customer_master_key_spec.description: The specification of the KMS key, defining its cryptographic capabilities.

encryption_algorithms.description: A list of encryption algorithms that the KMS public key supports.

id.description: The unique identifier for the KMS public key.

key_usage.description: Specifies how the KMS key can be used, such as for encryption or signing.

public_key.description: The KMS public key in binary format used for encryption or verification.

public_key_pem.description: The KMS public key in PEM format, suitable for use in applications that require PEM encoding.

signing_algorithms.description: A list of signing algorithms that the KMS public key supports.
